ac_evidence.ac: .golangci.yml configuration file created with appropriate rules for the project
Makefile contains lint target that runs golangci-lint run ./...
make lint passes on existing codebase (or exceptions configured for legacy code)
GitHub Actions workflow .github/workflows/lint.yml runs on PRs and main branch
Linting workflow fails if linting errors are detected
ac_evidence.evidence: Workflow includes golangci-lint-action with default behavior

ac_evidence.ac: README.md updated with linting instructions for developers
All new code submissions will be automatically linted
ac_evidence.evidence: Workflow triggers on push and pull_request

ac_evidence.ac: Common issues like unused variables, format inconsistencies, and potential bugs are caught

existing_work_summary: Found existing Makefile with vet/fmt targets, README.md with basic code quality section, go.yml workflow for testing; no existing .golangci.yml or lint.yml. Added lint configuration, Makefile target, GitHub Actions workflow, and documentation.
